hypothesis: Hypothesis 1 (Volatility-Based Adaptive Control Flow):** Modifying the eBPF bytecode to inject a dynamic conditional jump (`BPF_JMP_REG`) that reads from a local register tracking an exponentially weighted moving average (EWMA) of array inversions. When this "volatility" metric falls below a pre-calculated threshold, the eBPF program dynamically branches away from the JIT-optimized branchless block-partitioning routines and falls through to a compact scalar insertion-sort loop, maximizing throughput for high-entropy data while minimizing instruction overhead for near-sorted sub-blocks.
